completed_tasks.name: Data Foundation (Prisma schema, R2 client, validations, types)
Server Actions (chart CRUD, uploads, designer/genre creation)
Chart Form UI (~50 fields, uploads, inline entity creation)
Chart Detail & List Pages (badges, status control, detail/list views)

remaining_tasks.name: Human Verification Checkpoint — chart form rebuild + lifecycle testing

decisions.decision: Lazy Prisma proxy in db.ts to prevent build-time throw when DATABASE_URL not set
decisions.rationale: Allows build to succeed in CI/dev without database connection
dotenv default is .env, but Next.js convention is .env.local

decisions.decision: CLAUDE.md modularized — tech stack and design context moved to docs/
decisions.rationale: 613 lines was too long for agents to reliably read; reference material separated from rules

decisions.decision: DesignOS enforcement added — guardrail, DESIGN-REFERENCE.md, read_first requirement
decisions.rationale: Phase 2 auto-generated form ignored user's design work; three-layer enforcement prevents recurrence

decisions.decision: Chart form ground-up rebuild (not incremental patch)
decisions.rationale: Current form diverges from DesignOS in ~15 ways; no users/data so clean slate is better foundation
Free a11y, keyboard nav, focus management; restyled with emerald highlights
Focus trapping, escape, ARIA, overlay click handling built in

decisions.decision: Inline genre add (pill row), dialog for designer add
decisions.rationale: Genre is just a name (inline is faster); designer needs name+website (dialog gives room)

decisions.decision: Native radio for Digital/Paper (no shadcn RadioGroup)
decisions.rationale: Only 2 options, KISS; revisit if more radio groups appear

decisions.decision: Semantic design tokens only, no hardcoded Tailwind colors
decisions.rationale: Follows phase 1 pattern; dark mode comes free

next_action: 1) Start new session. 2) Create implementation plan from design spec using superpowers:writing-plans. 3) Execute plan to rebuild chart form.
context_notes: Design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-28-chart-form-rebuild-design.md. Architecture: useChartForm hook + 8 section components + 10 form primitives, shared between add form and edit modal. Server actions, Zod schemas, types, route pages stay mostly untouched. Upload URLs need Zod schema extension. R2 not configured in .env.local yet.
